items.title: hololive VTuber Houshou Marine’s PUBG MOBILE collab event gets underway
items.author: James Richardson
items.content: A new in-game collaboration with popular VTuber Houshou Marine has begun in the globally popular battle royale game PUBG MOBILE.

items.title: hololive New Year’s Eve countdown concert to return for 2025
items.author: Charlotte Davis
items.content: The concert is a massive, multi-hour music and variety special that brings together the talents from all of the different branches of the hololive Production agency.

items.title: hololive’s Usada Pekora issues statement as graduation rumors spread
items.author: Charlotte Davis
items.content: The popular VTuber Usada Pekora, who is affiliated with the group hololive, has issued an official statement regarding rumors that she is planning to "graduate," or retire from her activities.

items.title: Tokyo’s new hololive event features a giant gachapon machine and exclusive merch
items.author: Charlotte Davis
items.content: "Hello hololive," a new special event based on the popular VTuber group, has officially opened in Tokyo’s iconic SHIBUYA TSUTAYA building.

items.title: hololive unveils new range of summer-themed phone accessories
items.author: Charlotte Davis
items.content: Smartphone accessory brand RHINOSHIELD has launched its second official collaboration with the virtual YouTuber (VTuber) production company hololive.
